claims.summary: Pressure history and heartbeat state are meaningful continuity evidence, not merely transport counters.
claims.disposition: verify BridgeState preserves pressure samples, telemetry timing, connection lifecycle, and heartbeat correlation

claims.summary: Missing pressure must become an explicit transition rather than silently disappearing from the trend.
claims.disposition: verify the telemetry_gap path and missing-pressure regression

claims.summary: A fixed five-sample window can overreact to jitter and conceal the difference between a fast edge and slower context.
claims.disposition: verify dynamic 5-to-20 sample entropy ballast plus fast-window, slow-window, divergence, range, and oscillation classifications

claims.summary: Pressure stability should include spectral drift, semantic viscosity, coherence, and fidelity rather than one scalar score.
claims.disposition: verify the multi-signal smoothing projection and its no-pressure-control authority
